title: The Poisons Act, 1919
full_text: The Poisons Act, 1919 विष अधिनियम,1919 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191912 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1919-09-03 Act Year: 1919 Short Title: The Poisons Act, 1919 Hindi Title: विष अधिनियम,1919 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law regulating the importation, possession and sale of poisons. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 03-09-1919 Last Updated: 03-12-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Poisons Act, 1919 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Power of the State Government to regulate possession for sale and sale of any poison. Section 3. Power to prohibit importation into the States of any poison except under licence. Section 4. Power to regulate possession of any poison in certain areas. Section 5. Presumption as to specified poisons. Section 6. Penalty for unlawful importation, etc. Section 7. Power to issue search warrants. Section 8. Rules. Section 9. Savings. Section 10. [Repealed.].
